title: Coming this summer - Mallorca's "Digital Twin' with beach information
description: Other information will be for coastal safety and water management. Said to be pioneering technology in Spain, the app will use data and artificial intelligence for real-time monitoring of beach occupancy

title: Bitcoin Hashrate Drops as Miners Switch to AI
description: The Bitcoin network is witnessing an unprecedented collapse in hashrate as major mining operations pivot their infrastructure toward the high-margin world of artificial intelligence.
content:
A significant drop in the network's computing power is being driven by a technological rival.
Major Bitcoin miners are increasingly unplugging their mining rigs and repurposing their data centers for AI compute.

title: The AI race between China and the US heats up. These stocks could be winners, Bernstein says
description: Whether China or the US wins the race for artificial intelligence ultimately relies on the ability to power the new technology, according to Bernstein.
content:
Bernstein says China AI compute could reach 1936 ZFLOPs by 2035, topping US, boosting CATL, Sungrow, Cambricon and Hygon as Beijing expands power and chip capacity.

title: With a global boom in AI, does Australia need more data centres?
description: As the use of Artificial Intelligence surges around the world, the number of data centres required to power the technology is also growing rapidly, including in Australia. Now the Federal Government is laying out a plan aiming to ensure sustainability, as investment in data centres grows.

title: Pioneering Welsh AI cancer trial 'will have a huge impact' on clinical outcomes
description: LBC’s been told a first-of-its-kind UK trial detecting multiple cancer types, using artificial intelligence, is showing “mind-blowing” results.
content:
